empty_hint: Ask Many to create a feeder script that fetches live data (APIs, Redfish, etc.) and attaches it to this artifact.
secrets_hint: Encrypted vault for API passwords and keys. Values are never shown after saving.
vault_unavailable: OS encryption unavailable — feeder secrets cannot be stored on this system.
approve_hint: Review the script once. After approval, it can run without further prompts until the script changes.
